channel.title: I can't run my server
channel.description:
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->
I am New to Frontity, I literally started today, I Followed the instructions given in the tutorial. Everything works well until I start the server, the server is not running and it shows an error in the terminal. Uploaded below
![image|690x157](upload://sFvsW4wvLVoX0OVckFJuJTa3bVO.png)
My Node Version: 17.3.1 NPM Version: 8.1.4
Thanks

item.title: I can't run my server
item.dc:creator: Maushook
item.description:
Delete Everything, Install Node.js on the folder you are creating a project and try again, Worked for me

Read full topic

item.title: I can't run my server
item.dc:creator: Maushook
item.description:
I am New to Frontity, I literally started today, I Followed the instructions given in the tutorial. Everything works well until I start the server, the server is not running and it shows an error in the terminal. Uploaded below

My Node Version: 17.3.1
NPM Version: 8.1.4

Thanks

Read full topic
